home.title: Welcome
home.description: Use the navigation above to browse the catalog and manage your collection.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.description: This page lists all available games and lets you add them to your collection.
catalog.errorLoad: Could not load the catalog right now.
catalog.errorAdd: Could not add this game to your collection.
catalog.gameCount: {count, plural, =0 {No games available} one {# game available} other {# games available}}

collection.title: Collection
collection.description: This page shows games you collected, with status, rating, and remove actions.
collection.empty: Your collection is empty. Add games from Catalog first.
collection.errorLoad: Could not load your collection right now.
collection.errorUpdate: Could not update this game right now.
collection.gameCount: {count, plural, =0 {No games in collection} one {# game in collection} other {# games in collection}}
collection.confirmRemoveInProgress: This game is In Progress. Remove it anyway?
